memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description: Thomas de Monthermer, 2nd Baron Monthermer, was the son of Ralph de Monthermer, 1st Baron Monthermer and Joan of Acre, the daughter of King Edward I of England. He was a first cousin of King Edward II …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermer於1301年10月4日出生在英國戴文斯托肯哈姆時，他的父親Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford31歲，母親Countess Joan of Acre29歲。他於從1331年到1339年與Margaret de Braose結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1340年6月24日在英國哈普爾比曉普斯托可享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermer于1301年10月4日出生在英国戴文斯托肯哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford31岁，母亲Countess Joan of Acre29岁。他于从1331年到1339年与Margaret de Braose结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1340年6月24日在英国哈普爾比曉普斯托可享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermer was born on 4 October 1301, in Stokenham, Devon, England, his father, Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford, was 31 and his mother, Countess Joan of Acre, was 29. He married Margaret de Braose from 1331 to 1339. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 24 June 1340, in Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermer est né le 4 octobre 1301, à Stokenham, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Countess Joan of Acre, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Braose du 1331 au 1339. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1340, à Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermer am 4. Oktober 1301 in Stokenham, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford 31 und seine Mutter Countess Joan of Acre 29. Er hat von 1331 bis 1339 Margaret de Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Juni 1340 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermer è nato il il 4 ottobre 1301 nel Stokenham, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Countess Joan of Acre, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Braose da 1331 a 1339. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 24 giugno 1340, nel Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermerが1301年10月4日にイギリスデボンストケンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertfordは31歳，母Countess Joan of Acreは29歳であった。から1331年まで1339年にMargaret de Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1340年6月24日にイギリスハンプシュアイアビショプストクで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermer(이)가 1301년 10월 4일 영국 데폰 스토켄함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Joan of Acre(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1331년 부터 1339년 까지 Margaret de Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1340년 6월 24일 영국 함프실르 비숍스토크에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.4 October 1301–24 June 1340: 1301 оны Аравдугаар сарын 4–1340 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 24

pt.4 October 1301–24 June 1340: 4 de outubro de 1301–24 de junho de 1340
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermer nasceu em 4 de outubro de 1301, em Stokenham, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Countess Joan of Acre, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Braose de 1331 a 1339. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1340, em Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermer родился 4 октября 1301 г. в местности стокенам, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Countess Joan of Acre, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Braose с 1331 по 1339. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 24 июня 1340 г. в местности бишопсток, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.

sm.BET 1331 AND 1339: mai le 1331 e o'o I le 1339

es.4 October 1301–24 June 1340: 4 de octubre de 1301–24 de junio de 1340
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Monthermer 2nd Baron de Monthermer nació el 4 de octubre de 1301, en Stokenham, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Countess Joan of Acre, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret de Braose desde 1331 hasta 1339. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 24 de junio de 1340, en Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años.
